steps.title: Find b using the y-intercept
steps.content:
The y-intercept occurs when $x = 0$. We have:
$$f(0) = a^0 + b = 1 + b = -25$$
Solving for $b$:
$$b = -26$$

steps.title: Find a and calculate a + b
steps.content:
The graph passes through $(2, 23)$, so:
$$f(2) = a^2 + b = 23$$
Substitute $b = -26$:
$$a^2 - 26 = 23$$
$$a^2 = 49$$
$$a = 7$$
Since $a > 0$, we take the positive root. Therefore:
$$a + b = 7 + (-26) = -19$$
